description: Mitsubishi's first ever World Rally Car specification Lancer Evolution. Unlike its successful Group A predecessors, it was not able to carry the same championship-winning legacy with all 3 wins from the 2001 season coming from last season's Lancer Evolution 6 TME. This would also be Tommi Mäkinen's last ever ride in a Mitsubishi rally car.
creator: Bnuuy
